reviews.review_description: The graphics are captivating, and the game play is perfectly balanced.  Expect a challenge!
I can't seem to play this game it launches but then when I hover over play nothing happens. Can anyone help this madness
It's pretty, but only if you don't move your head.  Moving at all blurs the game and it's annoying enough to not play anymore.

developer_response.body: Very sorry to hear that you're experiencing this problem on the S7 Edge. We are working on a fix for this performance issue.

reviews.review_description: Game looks great really fun and addictive can’t wait for more and new levels
Great game

reviews.review_title: Does not run well on s7 edge
reviews.review_description: Very stuttery render on s7 edge. Not playable.

developer_response.body: Very sorry to hear that you're experiencing this problem on the S7 Edge. We are working on a fix for this performance issue.

reviews.review_description: Great game great graphics for type of game got me hooked.good buy
I thourght I would not like this game. The wife got me interested in purchasing it. And I have not regretted it .Its a well polished game

reviews.review_title: Crash everytime on my s7 edge
reviews.review_description: Can I get a refund?

developer_response.body: Very sorry to hear that you're experiencing this problem on the S7 Edge. We are working on a fix for this performance issue.

reviews.review_description: Excellent game well made
Terrible echo, have to switch sound off

developer_response.body: Apologies about the sound issues. Please email contact@elementgamesonline.com and let me know your Android device as well as whether you are using bluetooth headphones and a bluetooth gamepad.

reviews.review_description: Favorite Oculus Go game right now. Demo version doesn’t do full version justice.
Always crashed at beginning.

The screen shakes so violently I can't even play the game because it makes me feel like I'm having a seizure. So many bugs and my cursor does not stay still. How can I play the game if there is a constant earthquake. I want my money back!! I even tried to deal with the horrible shuttering but I can't take it. I want my money back.

developer_response.body: Very sorry to hear that you're experiencing this problem. Are you using an S7 Edge? If so, we are aware of a performance issue and are working hard to fix it.

reviews.review_description: The game play is so far zoomed out I immediately feel cross-eyed and there does not appear to be a way to correct that. I have to close one eye to navigate anything.

developer_response.body: Hi, please fully uninstall and reinstall the game to fix this. There was a store bug that was causing this issue, and Samsung has flagged the game so that the cross-eyed visuals no longer occur. This will delete your profile -- If you have a profile that you'd like to keep, please email contact@elementgamesonline.com for instructions on how to preserve your save progress. Thank you again for playing Evil Robot Traffic Jam!

reviews.review_description: Very good .when you add more match please .i like this game so much

reviews.review_title: decent tower defense, but cross eyed
reviews.review_description: no other game has caused me to feel cross-eyed, but I was concerned after playing this for 45 mins

developer_response.body: Hi, please fully uninstall and reinstall the game to fix this. There was a store bug that was causing this issue, and Samsung has flagged the game so that the cross-eyed visuals no longer occur. This will delete your profile -- If you have a profile that you'd like to keep, please email contact@elementgamesonline.com for instructions on how to preserve your save progress. Thank you again for playing Evil Robot Traffic Jam!

reviews.review_title: Sound problem make an awful experience
reviews.review_description:
The game seems cool but the sound is not working properly. The music Is playing like the game cannot decode it properly. Hissing and cracking.  I uninstalled and reinstalled the game twice and it's always the same issue. I also reboot my phone and still the same issue.
I do not use Bluetooth headset, just wired ones or none. 
I have a Galaxy s7 edge. Can you tell me how to fix that or refund me?  Thanks in advance.
I just read some reviews and a lot of persons are complaining about audio or video issues and no words from the developers....

developer_response.body: Very sorry to hear that you're experiencing this problem on the S7 Edge. We are working on a fix for this performance issue.

reviews.review_description: Highly Recommend! Enjoying each traffic jam level, a lot of fun. Thanks!

My favorite game. Works great on the S7. Finished all of the levels, which varied in difficulty, but can't get better than silver on the snow or final level. Well done devs, can't wait to see more from you. Would be even better to have game pad controls.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the nice review! The game does support various gamepads actually -- please email contact@elementgamesonline.com with which one you're using so we can look into it!
